plan_visibility.Organization: Organization- anyone at my organization can view
plan_visibility.Public: Public- anyone can view or download from the Public DMPs page
plan_visibility.private: Private- visible to me, specified collaborators and administrators at my organization

attribute_labels.contributor: Please list the project’s Principal Investigator(s) and those responsible for data management.
attribute_labels.data_access_collaborators: How will the research team and other collaborators access, modify, and contribute data throughout the project?
attribute_labels.data_collection: What types of data will you collect, create, link to, acquire and/or record?
attribute_labels.data_sharing_awareness: What steps will be taken to help the research community know that your data exists?
attribute_labels.data_sharing_form: What data will you be sharing and in what form? (e.g. raw, processed, analyzed, final).
attribute_labels.data_sharing_license: Have you considered what type of end\\\-user license to include with your data?
attribute_labels.documentation_collection: How will you make sure that documentation is created or captured consistently throughout your project?
attribute_labels.documentation_data: What documentation will be needed for the data to be read and interpreted correctly in the future?
attribute_labels.ethical: Research outputs may have ethical concerns
attribute_labels.file_formats: What file formats will your data be collected in? Will these formats allow for data re\\\-use, sharing and long\\\-term access to the data?
attribute_labels.long_term_deposition: Where will you deposit your data for long\\\-term preservation and access at the end of your research project?
attribute_labels.manage_IP_issues: How will you manage legal, ethical, and intellectual property issues?
attribute_labels.metadata_standards: If you are using a metadata standard and/or tools to document and describe your data, please list here.
attribute_labels.plan_collaborators: Invite specific people to read, edit, or administer your plan. Invitees will receive an email notification that they have access to this plan.
attribute_labels.plan_visibility: Public or organizational visibility is intended for finished plans.
attribute_labels.preservation_ready: Indicate how you will ensure your data is preservation ready. Consider preservation\\\-friendly file formats, ensuring file integrity, anonymization and de\\\-identification, inclusion of supporting documentation.
attribute_labels.research_outputs: Please list your anticipated research output(s).
attribute_labels.resources_for_dmp: What resources will you require to implement your data management plan? What do you estimate the overall cost for data management to be?
attribute_labels.responsibilities: Identify who will be responsible for managing this project\'s data during and after the project and the major data management tasks for which they will be responsible.
attribute_labels.responsibilities_change_management: How will responsibilities for managing data activities be handled if substantive changes happen in the personnel overseeing the project\'s data, including a change of Principal Investigator?
attribute_labels.secondary_use_sensitive_data: If applicable, what strategies will you undertake to address secondary uses of sensitive data?
attribute_labels.secure_sensitive_data: If your research project includes sensitive data, how will you ensure that it is securely managed and accessible only to approved members of the project?
attribute_labels.storage_how: How and where will your data be stored and backed up during your research project?
attribute_labels.storage_requirements: What are the anticipated storage requirements for your project, in terms of storage space (in megabytes, gigabytes, terabytes, etc.) and the length of time you will be storing it?
attribute_labels.version_convention: What conventions and procedures will you use to structure, name and version\\\-control your files to help you and others better understand how your data are organized?

attribute_labels.Output_if_other: If you select Type \"other\" please describe the output type.
attribute_labels.Title: Title
